title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 17 2022
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 17 2022
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 17 2022
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 17/03/2022
DCE iron ore futures market rose by 4.65%,the main contract closed 810. the quotation in the morning was increased by 10 yuan/mt overyesterday. some traders were active to sell, Some steel procurement more cautious.
